film.title: Picture Perfect
film.overview: A young advertising executive's life becomes increasingly complicated when, in order to impress her boss, she pretends to be engaged to a man she has just met.

dialogues.dialogue: I admit it.  Okay.  Yeah, I admit it. I'm not ashamed of it, okay?.  And you know why I have a mistress?.  Because she has a mistress, too.
but while you're still single??!.  [ Crowd Gasps ]  Shame on you!  Don't bother looking back. He is out of your life.  Come on.

We're in advertising, Kate. I didn't lie. I sold.  Oh, God, I got to sit down.  I told him you were too proud to mention it yourself.  They all said they want to meet him, of course.  Oh, great. Oh, my God.
